messages.message: I intend to focus on securing southern Europe and may move toward Tuscany or Apulia. If you do not plan to challenge me there, we could avoid conflict in the region.

Hey Italy! You know what they say about Italy/austria: if one of us dies, the other gets screwed over real quick. I'd love to find a way to help one another out this game. If you have any thoughts on openings or strategies, please let me know!
I notice we both border Venice. I have no interest in conflict with you unless provoked. Let’s see if we can coexist peacefully in the region.
Hi France! You up for demilitarizing Burgundy?
Hi there, Germany! I would love to work together this game, if possible. I don't believe we'll have much reason to fight one another. Can we agree to DMZ in Tyr/boh?

Hey Russia!

I reckon R/T is one of the most powerful alliances in the game, so I hope we can work together!
I agree to that, sure!
Hey England! How's it going?

Hey Turkey, I couldn't agree more! To begin, shall we start by bouncing in the Black Sea?
Also, any thoughts on our first target?
Hi Russia! I hope we can agree on non-aggression and a demilitarized zone in the Baltic sea. I'm open to helping you in Scandinavia as well.

Hey France!
I know we don't share borders but we do share some common neighbors. Any thoughts on who you might want to go after first?
Wonderful! I'll be in touch if I have any thoughts or plans that could help you out this game.

Hey Germany!
I would love to make Prussia and Silesia a DMZ, with the exception of builds. I would also love any support you might be able to give in the north. Any thoughts on who you want to focus on first?

Hey England,
I know we don't share a border but I would like to keep some peace in Scandinavia, possibly working together against Germany? Any thoughts on your first target?

Hey Russia, good luck this game!
I was just about to message you about a sealion - would you be interested? England is always super dangerous if left unchecked, and a sealion is a pretty strong opening for both of us.

Hey Italy,
Any thoughts on our common neighbors, Austria and Turkey?
Let me know your thoughts.
Likewise! Good luck.

Hey Austria,
Any thoughts on our common neighbors, Italy and Turkey?
Let me know your thoughts.
Gladly! I have no interest in conflict with you. I hope we can establish a healthy DMZ between us.
Definitely a DMZ in those areas! Good luck, I'll let you know if I hear anything from England or France.
Sounds great, I love a good Sealion.
I aim to strengthen my hold in the Mediterranean. If you're focused on Greece or Anatolia, I won’t interfere, provided you leave me room to grow westward.
Hey Germany! Happy to make Burgundy a DMZ. In exchange, would you be interested in helping out Russia and me against England?
Do you think you could get Germany on board?

Hey Russia! I haven't gotten anything from Turkey yet, but I'd love to work with you this game if you're up for it. You seem like a really thoughtful player and I'd like to find a way to work together, if possible!
I'm reaching out to Germany now, will let you know what they say.
France has been talking to me about attacking England, what do you think? I feel like that could work well for all three of us.

I appreciate your thoughts on cooperation! I agree that we’re closely tied geographically. If you’re focused on Vienna or Budapest, I’ll keep my army in Rome or Venice and avoid pushing toward Trieste. Perhaps we could support each other’s goals if we align our early moves.

Austria and Turkey are certainly key players near us. I don’t see an immediate threat from either, but I’d prefer to focus on securing southern Europe first. If Turkey moves aggressively toward Greece or Anatolia, I’d be open to discussing mutual support—though I’m unlikely to divert resources from my own expansion.
Sounds good, I've also reached out to Germany.
Russia's on board with the idea of a sealion, so you two could discuss the details of it.

Hi Germany!
I'm doing pretty good. How about you?
Just reaching out to establish communications. I think our nations tend to be strong allies due to our central location. We're in a great spot to help each other early or later in the game. Do you have any interest in that or any other suggestions for our relationship moving forward?
Germany seems on board. Have you two discussed how to handle Norway/sweden?
I'd be happy to DMZ Galicia if you'd like! I think it would help us both out. I haven't heard anything from Turkey yet, but I'll keep you posted!

Hello Russia,
Yes, I'd love to keep a peaceful border between us.
I'm interested in moving against Germany, but the first move is usually pretty standard and I wouldn't be able to make a move against them immediately. Let's keep in touch and discuss our plans after we see how the first year goes.

Hey England! Good luck this game!
Are you interested in setting up a DMZ in the English Channel?
Okay, I will keep that in mind. Thank you.
We have agreed to leave them as they are and to discuss later.
Hey Turkey, good luck this game!
Thanks, good luck to you too!

Sounds great! Let's start out by doing some standard opening moves and see where we go from there. I have a DMZ in Tyrolia with Germany, so I'd prefer to avoid Tyrolia as well, if that's all right with you!
Hey Austria, good luck this game!
Hey Italy, that sounds good. I plan on taking Greece this year, but I won't interfere in your westward expansion
Sounds good to me, I would definitely be open to working against Germany.
Thanks, you too! Let's keep in touch this game; I'm sure we'll find a way to help one another!
Sounds good to me!

Good luck to you as well France!
A DMZ in the English Channel sounds good to me. I think that's a great way to build trust between us. Are you interested in further cooperation against Germany?
Also, have you heard anything from Turkey?

That’s good to hear—I’d like to maintain peaceful relations with you. If you’re moving toward Marseilles or Brest, I won’t interfere in Provence or the west. Let’s keep the focus on our respective regions for now.
I still haven't heard anything from Turkey. I assume you'll want Rumania in the fall?

I appreciate your thoughts about coexistence! To support peaceful cooperation, I’ll hold my army in Rome or Venice and avoid any moves toward Trieste or Tyrolia. If you plan to focus on Vienna or Budapest, I’ll gladly respect your space and focus on securing southern Europe.

Gladly.
I'm open to further cooperation against Germany, yes.

That’s great—I’m glad we’re aligned. If you’re focused on Greece and Anatolia, I’ll keep my focus westward in Italy and the Mediterranean. Let’s make sure we don’t interfere with each other’s goals for now.

Thank you for your response. I’m focused on securing southern Europe for now, and I don’t see immediate conflict with your goals. If Turkey moves aggressively toward Greece or Anatolia, I’ll keep our conversation in mind and be open to support—though I’ll need to balance that with my own expansion.

I would prefer to take Black Sea. It ensures that neither of us gains it, but it isn't as threatening to the other as Armenia.

I'm planning on taking Bulgaria and Greece this year. Depending on how things go, I might be able to support you into Rumania, or we can take down Austria together

Hey Austria, how are things?

I plan on taking Bulgaria this year. Depending on how things go, I might be able to help you out against Russia.
Gladly.
Sounds good!
Sounds good.
Hi Italy! Just wanted to say hi and that I look forward to working with you later in the game.
Perfect. I'll be in touch after the opening move to discuss plans going forward.
Sounds good.

Sure, France has contacted me about an alliance against you. Obviously I'd much rather side with you, but we have to be careful to mask that. Any thoughts on how to keep France out of the English Channel?

I've been in contact with Italy, and he wants Greece and was asking for help if you attacked him. Just thought I would let you know, not that it matters as I think we should just wipe Austria and Italy off the board quickly.
Hey there Turkey! Yeah, let's see where we go after the spring moves. Russia is playing it a bit close to the chest, which is concerning.
I think a bounce in the Black Sea would be better for both of us, I have been in contact with Austria and we seem to be on good terms, I don't think he will suspect an attack.
Sounds good! I've messaged Russia to discuss it.
Sounds good! I'm going to grab Denmark this turn, then. How do we want to deal with Sweden? I'm open to giving you it if we can come to an arrangement about Norway and the British Scs.
Hey Austria, any thoughts on our neighbor, Turkey? He has been talking to me about attacking you, but I am still deciding what to do.

Thanks for letting me know. I think that's really smart. I'd love to go forward with an alliance. Are you interested in pursuing that goal?
As far as keeping France out of the English Channel, it won't be possible in the opening year. But I would appreciate your support in that regard. Let's discuss it more when we see how the opening move goes.
I'd be interested in you having Belgium in the first year if that interests you.
I'd be okay with splitting it that way.

Hello Germany! It's good to hear from you. I’m focused on securing southern Europe and the Mediterranean for now, so I don’t foresee any immediate conflict with your goals. If you plan to expand into central Europe, I’ll be happy to stay out of your way and focus on my own expansion.
Wonderful! I will be focused on the Balkans, so no worries there!
Very much! Let's see what the opening moves look like, then we'll be in touch. I'm open to giving you Belgium, but I won't be able to help you in that regard this turn.
Russia seems to be on board. He's agreed to helping you out in Scandinavia, so I can focus on the low countries.
Perfect!
Great, sounds like a plan.

That’s reassuring—I appreciate your focus on the Balkans. I’ll continue to keep my forces in Rome and Venice, avoiding any pressure on Trieste or Tyrolia. If your plans evolve, feel free to let me know!
Russia has been fairly communicative with me so far, so I'm not sure what their plans are. If you hear anything, let me know
That's great to hear! They are telling me you're looking to attack me; I think they might be planning a bounce in the black sea

Okay, that all sounds good.

What's Italy been saying to you? They were saying the same thing to me, but they seemed more focused on Austria.
Yeah, Turkey is trying to get me to fight you. I'd be happy to team up against them with you!
Just the usual niceties, he has no real thoughts as of yet.
Great! I’m glad we’re aligned. I’ll keep my focus on southern Europe, and I hope your expansion in central Europe goes smoothly. Let’s maintain peaceful coexistence for now.
Sounds good, any thoughts on how to move?
Okay.

Hello Germany! It’s good to hear from you—I appreciate your openness to cooperation. I’ll keep my focus on securing southern Europe, particularly Tuscany and Apulia, so I don’t foresee any conflict with your central European ambitions. If you’re heading toward Austria or France, I’ll gladly stay out of your way and focus on my own expansion.
I think Russia is planning an attack on you. I said that I plan on taking Bulgaria and Greece, which is true. I haven't mentioned attacking you
Nothing particularly exciting. I'm planning to move down to Serbia and Albania to try to pick up a few balkans.
Ohhh, makes sense! I wasn't really able to get much out of them.
He seems fairly okay with leaving each of us alone.
Cool, any thoughts on how to deal with Turkey?
I'd say move to the Black Sea for sure. We should be able to get you into Rumania in the fall.
Have you heard from Germany recently?

They told me that Italy was asking for help against me, but I don't really believe them.

I think that Russia is just trying to play us against each other

Hello Italy!
I just wanted to reach out and wish you good luck!
I know our countries have yet to be in contact, but I'd love to discuss with you plans moving forward. If you have any interest in allying, let's keep in touch.
Alright, sounds good to me.
That's what I'm worried about as well
I did, he seems to be on board.
I don't like a strong Russia, so I'll help you against them if they attack
That sounds great!

Hello England! Thank you for your kind message and interest in cooperation. I appreciate your openness. I’m focused on securing southern Europe and the Mediterranean, so I don’t foresee any immediate conflict with your interests. If you’re looking toward the North Sea or Scandinavia, I’d be happy to stay out of your way and focus on my own expansion.
Perfect.
Sounds good
Italy told me that they don't want to interfere with me, so I would watch out for them
Also, have you been in contact with Germany? He hasn't been responding to me.

Hello Austria!
I just wanted to reach out and wish you good luck!
I know our countries have yet to be in contact, but I'd love to discuss with you plans moving forward. If you have any interest in allying, let's keep in touch.

Hello Turkey!
I just wanted to reach out and wish you good luck!
I know our countries have yet to be in contact, but I'd love to discuss with you plans moving forward. If you have any interest in allying, let's keep in touch.
Hey there England! I wish you the best of luck as well! I'd love to keep in touch and see if we have any opportunities to work together.

Hey England, I hope we can have a fruitful relationship this game!

I'm not really sure what my plans are at this point. I'll probably try to get a couple of centers before making any big moves, but we'll see what happens
Got it! Thanks for the heads up.
I have been in contact with Germany. They agreed to a DMZ in Tyrolia. I'm hoping we can keep those agreements throughout the game!
Hi Turkey! Just wanted to check in. Good luck.
Hey Germany! Good luck to you too. I'm not planning on attacking you or Russia, but I do hope that we can keep in touch
Sounds good to me.
I think that's a smart plan. Keep in touch and let me know if you'd like to discuss anything.
Sounds good to me! Let me know if there's anything you'd like to discuss.
Of course!

ITALY: A VEN S A ROM - TUS

messages.message: That’s great—I’m glad you’re focusing on the Balkans. I’ll keep my forces secure in Rome and Venice and avoid any moves toward Trieste or Tyrolia. If your plans shift later, feel free to let me know!
I'm thinking of using Sevastopol to support Ukraine to Rumania. Are you planning to try and keep Turkey out of Greece?
Why Piedmont instead of Venice?
Not a great opening. You might want to reach out to Austria to try to get them on board with fighting Turkey.
Hey England, I think that Russia is in a really strong position right now. I don't think we should let them get too strong

Perfect! I’m happy to continue focusing on southern Europe while you expand in central Europe. Let’s maintain peaceful relations and avoid conflict. If your ambitions shift toward France or Austria, I’ll stay out of your way and focus on Tuscany and Apulia.
Also, has Italy mentioned anything about attacking you?
Nope, I'm thinking about trying to keep Turkey out of Greece. I don't think there's much point in trying to bounce them out.

I considered Venice, but with France’s aggressive moves into Spain and the south, I decided to reinforce Piedmont instead for better strategic flexibility. I still intend to keep Venice secure and won’t interfere with your plans in central Europe.
I'm still planning to head into Greece this fall; I assume you're going to Tunis?
Hey there England! I'm looking forward to seeing what happens with Belgium and Holland this fall. France looks like they're in a very strong position right now.
I'll see what I can do.

So, Russia is now in a really good position to take Rumania...and it looks like they have to decide between that and protecting Sevastopol.

I'd really prefer not to have to fight with you over Greece. I think it'd be better for both of us if you went for Rumania and I went for Greece. What do you think?

Tunis is not currently on my radar—I’m keeping my focus on securing southern Italy and watching France’s movements. I assume your push into Greece will keep you occupied further east, but if your plans change, feel free to let me know. I remain open to coordinating if it suits both our interests.

Yes, Russia seems to have moved all of their forces south. The fleet in Rumania is somewhat worrisome, though.

I'm a bit hesitant to let you take both Greece and Rumania, because then you'll be in a position to attack me.
Italy might be going for Greece too, though. Have you been talking to them?
Best of luck.
Hey, are you planning on taking Rumania this turn?
I think that's a smart plan. Let me know if there's anything you'd like to discuss.
I am, would you be open to supporting me in?
Absolutely! I will be interested to see what happens with France and England.

Hey there, France! I was wondering if you had any thoughts on Italy this game. We have a non-aggression pact right now, but I'm sure if we coordinate our moves a few years down the road, we'll be able to pick off a few Scs from them.
FYI, I'm going to have to build a fleet in Marseilles. I have no intention of breaking our DMZ, I just want it to be prepared in case I need to turn on England.
I agree. Looks like Germany is in a bit of trouble. Do you know what's happening with Italy in the opening move?
Yeah, not a bad idea. As long as they don't violate our Dmzs, I have no problem with them for now.
That's good to hear! It looks like you've made nice with France, so you might want to think about attacking Russia in the north
Great, we should be able to keep Turkey to one build.
I have a non-aggression pact with Italy, but that's the extent of it
Yeah, I think they will be occupied with Germany for a bit, so we shouldn't have to worry about them for a while.
Yeah, I talked with Italy, and I'm pretty sure they are going to Tunis
Absolutely.

I appreciate your clarification about building a fleet in Marseilles, but I must emphasize that southern Italy remains a critical region for me. I hope your preparations remain defensive, but I will continue to reinforce Rome and Naples to ensure stability in the south.
Did Italy go against your plans?
Did your plans go against Italy?
Sure thing
What would you like to do this turn?
Yeah, it seems that way. I'm not sure if I should trust them or not.
I'm going to be holding in Trieste this turn
Not quite... It seems like he's got other plans now though.
Yeah, I agree. It looks like they're going to try to make a move on Scandinavia.
Absolutely. I can't hold the Mediterranean for long if I turn on you. I'm moving into Spain with my army so you can trust that I don't have any intention of coming into the Med.
I guess I'll just go for Greece. I could support you into Rumania, but that's not necessary
I don't think you have much to worry about Italy at this point. They haven't moved to Tyrolia and if they do they'll have German support.
Yeah, looking good so far.

Yeah, I think that's a smart play. That'll set him up nicely to take Marseilles. You may want to try to coordinate with Austria to block that from happening. If Austria falls too quickly, Italy will have a very strong position to start attacking France, which is something we want to avoid.
I'll also be support holding Rumania
Have you talked to Germany? If they bounce Russia out of Sweden, Russia won't get any builds this year
Yeah, that's alright. Go ahead and get Greece

I agree—France’s and England’s moves are definitely worth watching. If your plans in the Balkans require support or coordination, I’m open to discussing it. For now, I’ll keep Tuscany and Venice secure to maintain pressure on France’s southern flank.
What are your thoughts on Germany and Turkey? Are you and Turkey going to be working together against Russia?
Thanks
Hey there Germany, I'm just checking in! Are you planning to bounce Russia in Sweden this fall?
Alrighty! I appreciate it! Let me know if there is anything I can do for you

I'm a little hesitant to commit to anything with Turkey and Russia; especially with Italy breathing down my neck.

As for Germany, I'm pretty sure we have a non-aggression pact, but I haven't heard anything from them since the spring.
Fair point! I'm definitely keeping an eye on them
No problem!
For now I'm going to be focusing on the Balkans

Your move into Spain is noted, and I appreciate your assurance about not entering the Mediterranean. That said, I will continue to reinforce southern Italy, particularly Naples and Rome, to ensure stability. I hope your focus remains on Spain and not the south.
I was just curious. Thanks for explaining!
Glad to hear it.
Same. I think Russia is just in a rough position because they had a bad opening, but otherwise seems to be doing alright.
Thank you
Yeah, we'll see how it plays out
I was thinking about that, sure.

I appreciate your focus on the Balkans—I’ll keep my forces secure in central Italy and avoid any moves toward Trieste or Tyrolia. If your plans shift later or require coordination, feel free to let me know.
Yeah, I'm inclined to do so. I don't want a too strong Russia, of course.
FYI, I'm going to try to take Belgium.

You're welcome! I'm glad to clarify—I'm keeping my focus on southern Italy, and I appreciate your understanding. If your plans evolve or if there's an opportunity for coordination, feel free to reach out. For now, I’ll remain neutral and avoid any moves that might disrupt your strategy in central Europe.
Sounds good.
I definitely agree! A strong Russia is bad for both of us.

That’s good to hear—keeping your focus on the Balkans suits me well. I’ll continue securing central Italy and monitoring France’s movements in the south. If you need coordination or support later, feel free to reach out. For now, I’ll ensure Venice and Tuscany remain strong to help deter any French aggression.
Okay, I'm grabbing Holland.
Sounds good!
Italy is suspicious of you right now, by the way.
Sounds good! I don't think I'll be involved in your side of the board for a while.
Good to know, I'll keep that in mind.
I have discussed it with them and I think they are planning on doing so.
Great. I'll see if I can get them on board.
I've heard that Germany might be willing to support you. I think that would be a smart move at this point. Let me know if you're open to that and we can discuss more.
Do you have any agreements with Italy? He seems to be showing a lot of trust in you...

Nice opening move! I've heard that Germany and Italy might try to make a move against you in Marseilles. Just wanted to let you know that I'll try to get more information and let you know if I hear anything that might be useful.
Nice opening move! I think it was a smart move. Are you moving against France?
Thanks for the heads up! I'd be open to discussing that.
Thanks!
We should be careful about giving France Belgium.
I think England is a little nervous about you as well, by the way.
I'm set to bounce him out.
Yeah, we have a non-aggression pact.
Thanks for the heads up!

Thank you—I agree it was a solid move to establish control in central Italy. I’m keeping a close eye on France’s southern ambitions, especially their push into Spain. While I focus on securing southern Europe, I hope England remains watchful of French naval movements in the North Sea and Channel.
What did you have in mind?
Good to know. England and I agreed to a DMZ, so I'll have to play it carefully. Thanks for the heads up.
Great

I appreciate your assurances, but I must reiterate that southern Italy remains vital to my stability. If your focus truly remains in Spain, I will do the same. However, should I detect any movement toward the Mediterranean, I will act decisively to protect my interests.
Absolutely. Good to hear we're on the same page.
Germany, France is asking me to try and make peace with Austria, do you have any thoughts?

I’ve been watching your movements in the eastern Mediterranean with interest. While my focus remains on southern Italy, I’d be open to discussing coordination or mutual defense opportunities in the future.
He hasn't talked to me much about Austria yet. I'm just concerned that you and Austria have a pact given your movements and Austria's.

I appreciate your continued focus on the Balkans. If your ambitions shift westward or southward, I’d welcome the chance to coordinate. For now, I’ll maintain pressure on France’s southern flank while ensuring Venice and Tuscany remain secure.
I'm just worried about an Anglo-french alliance, I'm getting mixed signals from the two.
Hey Italy, don't worry about my fleet in the Aegean. I plan on taking Greece, not Naples.
I'd be open to coordinating, but what did you have in mind?

I appreciate your assurances about focusing on Greece rather than Naples. That said, I remain open to future coordination opportunities—especially if mutual interests emerge in the eastern Mediterranean. For now, I’ll continue to secure southern Italy, but I’d welcome a conversation about potential cooperation down the line.

Hey Germany, I wanted to ask you a quick favor.

Russia is getting really strong, and they might get Rumania this year. Can you bounce them out of Sweden? England said that they would help me against them, and I think it would be a good idea for you as well.
No problem. Just to be clear, are we bouncing Black Sea again?
I'll consider it, but I'm not in a great position to do so this turn.
Hey France, have you heard anything from Italy? They are making very vague moves, so I'm not sure what they're up to

Alright, I'll stay out of Naples and Apulia.

I won't interfere with your move to Tunis this year

You might be able to move into Sweden, and if England moves into Barents Sea, Russia will have to decide between getting Rumania or St. Petersburg.

Your call though
It looks like you have a good relationship with France, so that might not be a bad idea
Hey Austria, are you on right now? I think we should discuss Russia

If your fleet remains focused on Greece and the Aegean, I see no immediate threat to my holdings. Should you ever consider an alliance or coordinated move in the region, I’d be interested in exploring that. For now, I’ll keep my forces focused on Rome and Naples.
I'll need a strong alliance with England against Russia, and I'm not certain I have one...
That sounds good.
I think they're focusing on the south, so you should be alright. I think Austria is concerned about a Lepanto, though.

Your assurance is noted, but I remain cautious about any sudden French moves toward the Mediterranean. While I hope your focus stays in Spain, I will continue to reinforce southern Italy and monitor your fleet closely.
Nice opening move! I'm glad to see we both kept our word and won't be making a move on each other. Are you interested in discussing our plans for the next couple moves?
If England moves into Barents, and you bounce Russia out of Sweden, Russia will have to decide between losing St. Petersburg or Rumania

Thanks for the heads up. I don't think France is going to get any builds this year. He'll only have 1 unit that can potentially take a center and 2 others that can't. I'm not worried about him. He's still got work to do.
Or you could build a fleet in Berlin and take Sweden next year
Okay, thanks for the info
Sure thing, what are you thinking?
That's true! I'll think about it.
Fair enough. Let's see how it goes.
I think that would work best.
Cool
Sounds good
Italy told me that they're going to be focusing on Austria and France, so we might be able to take them out fairly easily
Okay, that sounds good to me.
Nice

I appreciate your assurances about staying out of Naples and Apulia. My focus remains on securing southern Italy against potential French incursions, so I’m glad to hear your fleet will remain in Greece. If your interests ever align with mine in the eastern Mediterranean, I’d be open to discussing cooperation.
Italy told me the same thing, so it should go smoothly.
I would love to work together

Yeah, Italy sent me the same message.

I asked Austria about their plans, and they said they were going to try to get you to support them into Rumania. I said that I could help them, but I don't plan on helping them
Alright, thank you for letting me know.
No problem
Would you be willing to support me into Bulgaria this turn?
Have you talked to Austria about attacking Turkey?
I haven't really decided what I'm going to do yet. I was thinking we could work together and figure out a good way to divide up Germany. Let me know what you're thinking.
I think I will be able to get Rumania without help from Austria this turn.
As you requested.
I'm thinking maybe me getting Sweden and Berlin, and you getting Kiel and Denmark?

I'm glad to hear you're open to working together—I appreciate your assurances about staying focused in Greece. If we can align on keeping the eastern Mediterranean stable, I’d welcome a formal agreement or mutual defense pact in the future. For now, I’ll continue to secure southern Italy while watching France closely.

I haven’t spoken to Russia about attacking Turkey, and I see no benefit in doing so. My focus remains on securing southern Italy and deterring French aggression. If Austria’s Balkan ambitions ever require coordination, I remain open to discussion.

I appreciate your response, but I remain cautious about any sudden French moves toward the Mediterranean. While I hope your focus stays in Spain, I will continue to reinforce southern Italy and monitor your fleet closely.

Given France’s aggressive positioning in Spain and their fleet in Brest, I believe a temporary defensive pact could benefit both of us. If your focus remains on the Balkans, I’ll ensure southern Italy is secure and ready to support you if needed. Would you be open to a mutual agreement to deter French expansion?

I appreciate your assurances about Greece, but I’d like to explore potential cooperation in the eastern Mediterranean. If your fleet remains active in the Aegean, could we consider a mutual defense arrangement to deter any French or Russian ambitions in the region?
That sounds like a good plan to me.
Great
Will you need help against Italy, by the way?

I’ve noticed France’s movements toward Spain, and I’m concerned about their long-term ambitions. If Germany’s focus remains on central Europe, I’d be open to a broader understanding to keep France contained. Would you be interested in discussing a potential alliance?
That should put us both at 7.

That’s excellent to hear—I’d love to explore cooperation further. While my focus remains on securing southern Italy against French aggression, I’d be open to a mutual defense or coordination agreement in the eastern Mediterranean if it aligns with your goals. Let’s discuss further!

No, I haven’t spoken to Austria about attacking Turkey. My focus remains on securing southern Italy and deterring French aggression. I see no immediate benefit in such a move, and I’d prefer to maintain stability in the region.
I'm open to it. Do you have any plans to deal with Austria?
I'm not sure, what are your thoughts?
Okay, I was just wondering.
You already said that, though.
No need for the copy/paste.

Your response is noted, but I remain cautious about any sudden French moves toward the Mediterranean. While I hope your focus stays in Spain, I will continue to reinforce southern Italy and monitor your fleet closely.
I think that's a good number.

I appreciate your comments, but I expect clarity and sincerity moving forward. Southern Italy is vital to my stability, and I will not tolerate any passive aggression or evasive replies. If your intentions remain focused on Spain, that is fine—but I will act decisively if I detect any movement toward the Mediterranean or southern Europe.

Given France’s aggressive expansion into Spain and the south, I believe a broader understanding between Italy and Germany could be mutually beneficial. If your focus remains in central Europe, perhaps we could coordinate to contain French ambitions. Would you be open to discussing a strategic alliance?
I was thinking about moving south to deal with him, but I can wait.

Given France’s aggressive posture in Spain and their fleet in Brest, I believe a defensive alliance between us could help contain their ambitions. If you’re open to coordinating in the south or Balkans, I’d welcome a discussion.
Cool
I'm not going to make any moves toward the Mediterranean.
Yeah. I'm thinking about bouncing Russia out of Sweden this turn to keep him from getting too strong, so I'd rather not open a front against Austria yet, but I could support you in a few turns.
For right now, I would definitely get two builds before moving south, I think.
I understand.
